expectations.evidence: File contains exactly 5 epics (E1 through E5), which falls within the 3-6 range.
All 5 epics use E-IDs (E1, E2, E3, E4, E5) instead of the required F-IDs (F1, F2, etc.). The assertion specifically requires F-IDs, not E-IDs.

Epics reference strategic goals by title name (e.g., 'Persistent Context', 'Structured Workflows') rather than by SG-ID (SG1-SG5). While the titles correspond to valid strategic goals in product.yaml, the assertion expects SG1-SG5 ID references. Field is named 'strategic_goal' instead of 'strategic_goal_ref'.

All 5 epics have complete IDD fields: intent with p1/p2/p3, constraints (in_scope, out_of_scope, must_not_break), success_scenarios (list), and failure_conditions (list). Verified across all epics E1-E5.
All 5 epics use E-IDs (E1, E2, E3, E4, E5). The assertion explicitly requires no E-IDs — epics should use F-IDs instead.
